attr.title: Haunted Lands
attr.desc: Slay grim cultists, infernal minions, and nightmarish creatures in this dark and bloody retro-inspired action platformer. Uncover secrets, acquire powerful artifacts, and face challenging bosses in the Haunted Lands.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam and copy all game files into assets folder. Alternatively you can download the original Episode Alpha from https://alevgor.itch.io/haunted-lands and place the Haunted_Lands_EA.exe into assets folder.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2980900/Haunted_Lands/) and copy all game files into `assets` folder. Alternatively you can download the original **Episode Alpha** from [Itch.io](https://alevgor.itch.io/haunted-lands) and place the `Haunted_Lands_EA.exe` into `assets` folder.
